Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: outerwear [300209265], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Large pieces of square, oblong, or triangular cloth used as garments traditionally for women worn over the shoulders, covering the back, chest, and, sometimes, head. Shawls can be made from cotton or wool, and can be plain or patterned.

Source.Source_ID: 2000097017/Schevill et al., Textile Traditions of Mesoamerica and the Andes (1996)
2000076154/Oettinger, Folk Treasures of Mexico: Nelson A. Rockefeller Collection (2010)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Pieza grande de tejido cuadrado, oblongo o triangular que se lleva sobre una prenda principal para cubrir los hombros y brazos.Tradicionalmente asociada al uso femenino. Estos pueden ser fabricados en tejidos de seda, algodón o combinados.

Source.Source_ID: 2000050549/Bembibre, Carlos, Del barroco al Rococó, Ed. Nobuko, Buenos Aires, 2005
2000050471/Moliner, María, Diccionario de uso del español, tomo II, Ed. Gredos, Madrid, 2004
2000050448/VV.AA., La compañía de Comercio de Francisco Ignacio de Yraeta (1767-1797), Universidad Iberoamericana, Ed. México D.F., 1985
2000050547/Sabau García, María Luisa, México en el Mundo de las colecciones de arte, Publicado por UCOL, 1994
2000050495/VVAA: "Diccionario de la Real Academia Española", tomos I y II, Ed. Espasa Calpe, Buenos Aires, 2001

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Grote vierkante, rechthoekige of driehoekige stukken stof die worden gedragen over de bovenkleding om schouders en armen te bedekken.
Großes quadratisches, rechteckiges, oder dreieckiges Tuch, das über Hauptkleidungsstücken als Bedeckung für die Schultern und Arme getragen wird.
قطع كبيرة من القماش المربع أو المستطيل أو المثلث تلبس فوق الملابس الرئيسية كغطاء للأكتاف والذراعين.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000010911/Detroit Art Registration and Information System Glossary (1980)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
